zh.lifeSummary: 當Owain Ap Hywel Dda of Deheubarth於0910年出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾利安迪費桑特時，他的父親Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britons31歲，母親Queen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Wales16歲。他和Angharad verch Llewelyn至少有5個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於0987年在他的家鄉享年77歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根卡迪福利安達福 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Owain Ap Hywel Dda of Deheubarth于0910年出生在威尔士卡馬特史爾利安迪費桑特时，他的父亲Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britons31岁，母亲Queen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Wales16岁。他和Angharad verch Llewelyn至少有5个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于0987年在他的家乡享年77岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根卡迪福利安達福 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from Apt, the Yiddish name of Opatów in Świętokrzyskie Voivodeship, Poland. The placename (in German, Yiddish, and Polish) is from a root meaning ‘abbot’, the place having been named for the local abbey. Compare   Abt  .

variants.name: Abt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Horst, Johann, Kurt.

German and Dutch: from Middle Low German or Middle Dutch abt ‘abbot’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a servant of an abbot or a nickname for someone thought to resemble an abbot in some way. In some instances it may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of   Abt  , a habitational name from Opatów in Poland.

variants.name: Apter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Bronya, Eliezer, Naftali.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Apt (see   Apt  ).
English: habitational name from Aptor in Marldon, Devon, composed of Old English uppe ‘up, above’ + torr ‘rocky outcrop’.

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
meanings: A Welsh name. Some write the name Hoel, which they render 'lordly;' if so, it may come from huail, a vice-regent, regent. Arthur derives the surname Howell from Corn. -Brit, houl, the sun; and he adds, high, exalted.' But Hywel is rather from hywel, conspicuous.

nameMeanings.name: Dda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (from North Africa): from the male personal name ʿAdda, used in the Maghreb, a pet form of any of the many names beginning with ʿAbd ‘servant’.
Turkish: ornamental or topographic name from ada ‘island’.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Owain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps derived in the Roman period from the Latin name Eugenius ( see Eugene ); alternatively, possibly from an Old Celtic name meaning ‘born of Esos’. Esos (or Aesos) was a Celtic god known to have been the subject of a cult in ancient Gaul.

en.lifeSummary: When Owain Ap Hywel Dda of Deheubarth was born in 0910, in Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Wales, his father, Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britons, was 31 and his mother, Queen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Wales, was 16. He had at least 5 sons and 4 daughters with Angharad verch Llewelyn. He died in 0987, in his hometown, at the age of 77, and was buried in Llandaff Cemetery, Cardiff, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Owain Ap Hywel Dda of Deheubarth est né en 0910, à Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Galles, son père, Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britons, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Queen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Wales, avait 16 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles avec Angharad verch Llewelyn. Il est décédé en 0987, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Llandaff Cemetery, Cardiff, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Owain Ap Hywel Dda of Deheubarth 0910 in Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britons 31 und seine Mutter Queen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Wales 16. Er hatte mit Angharad verch Llewelyn mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 0987 im Alter von 77 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Llandaff Cemetery, Cardiff, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Owain Ap Hywel Dda of Deheubarth è nato il nel 0910 nel Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Galles, il suo padre, Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britons, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Queen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Wales, aveva 16 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie con Angharad verch Llewelyn. Morì nel 0987, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Llandaff Cemetery, Cardiff, Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Owain Ap Hywel Dda of Deheubarthが0910年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランディフエイサントで生まれた時，父Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britonsは31歳，母Queen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Walesは16歳であった。彼はAngharad verch Llewelynとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は0987年に故郷で77歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズグラモーガンカーディッフランダッフ セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Owain Ap Hywel Dda of Deheubarth(이)가 0910년 웨일스 카마테실르 랜디프이산트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britons(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Queen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Wales(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Angharad verch Llewelyn(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 0987년 그의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 글램르건 카디프 랜다프 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Owain Ap Hywel Dda of Deheubarth nasceu em 0910, em Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Gales, seu pai, Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britons, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Queen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Wales, tinha 16 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas com Angharad verch Llewelyn. ru.Llandaff Cemetery, Llandaff, Cardiff, Wa: лландафф кеметири, кардифф, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Owain Ap Hywel Dda of Deheubarth родился в 0910 г. в местности лландифисант, кармартеншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britons было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Queen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Wales, 16. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери от Angharad verch Llewelyn. Он умер в 0987 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности лландафф кеметири, кардифф, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания.

Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas con Angharad verch Llewelyn. Murió en 0987, en su pueblo, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Llandaff Cemetery, Cardiff, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido.
